holdings.infoBox: FRDM is an equity ETF with a total of 135 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 12.31%, SK hynix at 10.28%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 7.90%, MediaTek at 5.56%, and Delta Electronics at 3.61%.

overview.description: The Freedom 100 Emerging Markets ETF (FRDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund selects and weights exposure to emerging market equities based on personal and economic freedom metrics. FRDM was launched on May 23, 2019 and is issued by Freedom.
